name: Honeywell Forge Building Management API
what_it_does: Honeywell Forge REST APIs for connected buildings and energy management platform. Enables AI agents to manage building system monitoring and control for HVAC, lighting, and access management, handle energy analytics and consumption data retrieval for sustainability and cost management, access predictive maintenance alerts and equipment fault detection for facilities operations, retrieve occupancy and space utilization data for workplace optimization, manage demand response and grid-interactive building automation, handle fire and life safety event data management, access indoor air quality and environmental sensor data for occupant health, retrieve portfolio-level building performance benchmarking data, manage maintenance workflow integration and work order automation, and integrate building data with energy management systems (EMS), CMMS, and enterprise platforms.
use_cases: Optimizing building energy from autonomous energy management agents
Monitoring occupant air quality from workplace health agents
Benchmarking portfolio energy performance from sustainability agents
Automating maintenance work orders from predictive maintenance agents
not_for: Residential HVAC without commercial building and portfolio management needs
Industrial process control without commercial facilities and energy management
Simple energy monitoring without integrated building control and automation
best_when: A commercial real estate or facilities management team using Honeywell Forge wants AI agents to automate energy optimization, occupant wellness monitoring, predictive maintenance, and portfolio-level building performance management.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Honeywell Forge provides access to fire safety and life safety system data — automated actions on safety system events must follow certified fire protection and life safety protocols. HVAC automation that affects air pressure differential in healthcare and cleanroom environments requires domain expert validation before deployment.

auth.notes: Honeywell Forge uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.honeywell.com. Honeywell also has separate Home and T6 thermostat APIs (consumer). Building Forge is enterprise platform. Webhooks for building events. REST API with JSON. Charlotte, North Carolina HQ. Honeywell divested residential products (Resideo 2018) — Building Forge is commercial portfolio.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-building enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per building and data point; portfolio licensing for large operators
pricing.notes: Charlotte, North Carolina. Founded 1906. Public (HON NASDAQ). $36B+ annual revenue. Building Technologies & Solutions division. Honeywell Forge launched 2019. Strong in airports, healthcare, campuses, and industrial facilities. Competes with Siemens and Johnson Controls for enterprise building management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: Life safety system data (fire, smoke) requires certified fire protection protocol for any automated response; never automate safety system actions without certified oversight
Consumer vs. enterprise APIs — Honeywell has separate APIs for home thermostats (T6, Home) and commercial buildings (Forge); ensure you're targeting the correct API surface
Healthcare HVAC pressure — automated HVAC control in healthcare settings affects isolation room pressure differentials; domain expert validation required before deployment
Portfolio vs. building scope — Forge has portfolio-level and building-level API scopes; ensure correct scope for your use case (portfolio analytics vs. building control)
Indoor air quality sensor calibration — IAQ sensor data accuracy depends on calibration schedule; automate calibration alerts before trusting IAQ data for occupant health decisions
Demand response program registration — grid-interactive demand response requires utility program enrollment; automated demand response cannot operate without active utility program registration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial building BMS and energy. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Building control, occupancy, and energy data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Building management and energy. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Physical building control and environmental data.
